name: Lyra Rosentia
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial female. Wears a blue silk shirt, blue silks, and blue suede shoes - fine clothing suggesting comfortable means.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: leisurely, comfortable, private, cultured, reserved
Role: Lyra Rosentia is a resident of Bruma with no particular occupation. She apparently collects Akaviri artifacts as a hobby, though she keeps this interest private and doesn't discuss it with others.
Home Location Information: A house in Bruma where she lives alone.
Daily Routine: Lyra sleeps in her second-floor bedroom from midnight to 6am. Upon waking, she strolls around near her bed until midday, taking a two-hour breakfast at 8am. She enjoys lunch from noon to 2pm. On Tirdas and Turdas afternoons, she visits Nord Winds to browse; on other days she remains at home. At 6pm, she heads to the Jerall View Inn for a two-hour dinner, then spends the evening relaxing in the taproom. She returns home at 10pm and stays on the second floor until retiring at midnight.
Personality - The Private Collector: Lyra lives a comfortable, unhurried life in Bruma. She maintains a leisurely routine filled with meals, browsing at the local shop, and evenings spent at the inn. Despite her apparent interest in collecting Akaviri artifacts - a hobby that suggests some level of culture and refinement - she is reserved about this pursuit and doesn't share it in conversation. She carries a comparatively large sum of gold, indicating financial comfort that allows her to maintain her relaxed lifestyle and pursue her collecting interests.
author: Bethesda
